tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]

[ch]G[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Em7[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]
                   

[Verse 1]                                  
                                   
[tab][ch]G[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]
She doesn't own a dress[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]    
hair is always a mess[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]C[/ch]
y'could catch her stealin she won't confess                                [/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]  
     she's beautiful[/tab]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]
She smokes a pack a day,[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Am[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]
no wait thats me but anyway.[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                       [ch]C[/ch]
She don't care a thing about that hey,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]
    She thinks I'm beautiful.[/tab]


[Instrumental]
        
[ch]G[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Em7[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]
[ch]G[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]
 
 
[Verse 2]       
 
[tab][ch]G[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]
She never comprimises,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]
She loves babies and surprises.[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]                        [ch]C[/ch]
She wears high heels when she excersises.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]
    Aint that beautiful?[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
Meet Virginia.[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]Em[/ch]
Well she wants to be the queen,[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]                [ch]Em[/ch]
Then she thinks about her scene.[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]                [ch]Em[/ch]
Pulls her hair back as she screams,[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]   
I don't really wanna be a queen.[/tab]


[Instrumental]
        
[ch]G[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Em7[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]
[ch]G[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]


[Verse 3]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]C[/ch]
  Her daddy wrestles alligators,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]
Mamma works on carburators.[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]        [ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]
Brother is a fine mediator for the president.[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]Am[/ch]
Well here she is again on the phone[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]D[/ch]
just like me hates to be alone[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]Am[/ch]
we just like to sit at home[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]D[/ch]
and rip on the president[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
Meet Virginia[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]                [ch]Em[/ch]
Well she wants to live her life,[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]Em[/ch]
then she thinks about her lie.[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]                [ch]Em[/ch]
Pulls her hair back as she screams,[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]                      [ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]

[ch]G[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Em7[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]
[ch]G[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]


[Verse 4]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]Am[/ch]
She only drinks coffee at midnight,[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]
when the moment is not right.[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]
   her timing is quite unusual.[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]Am[/ch]
You see her confidence is tragic,[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
But her intuition magic[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
and the shape of her body - unusual.[/tab]
